team_name: TenderIQ — Explainable AI & Multimodal Evaluation Engine for Government Procurement
summary: Design a technical platform using React, FastAPI, and Multimodal AI for government tender evaluation, eligibility analysis, and explainable evaluation reports.
key_steps: Development of a responsive, modern user interface
Creation of a live overview tracking active tenders and bids
Implementation of an Evidence Viewer for contextual snippets and page numbers from bidder's documents
Development of a fallback mechanism for manual review when necessary
Building of a fully-typed backend simulation layer
optimization_claims: The Human-AI Evaluation Workbench provides explainable evaluation reports
The system prevents silent algorithmic disqualification
constraints_addressed: Data integrity through declarative Pydantic schemas
Live overrides for dynamically recalculating bidder status
